mapper.sql: id AS log_id, application_id, agent_name, tool_name, request_payload, response_payload, call_status, retry_count, duration_ms, error_message, called_at, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tool_call_log (application_id, agent_name, tool_name, request_payload, response_payload, call_status, retry_count, duration_ms, error_message, called_at, created_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{agentName}, #{toolName}, #{requestPayload}, #{responsePayload}, #{callStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{calledAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tool_call_log WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY created_at, id
